titleStmt.title: SII 20.208: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 208. (B.K. No. 19 of 1936-37.) DĒVAṆGĀV, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Kallappa.

summary.p: This undated record registers a gift of land to god Kalidēva of Kēsarpaṭi by Magara-murāri Sōyidēva-nāyaka who was a subordinate of king Siṁghaṇa. It also records other gifts of land, oil and taxes to the same deity by the Mahājanas, Mummuridaṇḍas and others. This gift was made over to [Śiva]dēva, the āchārya of the temple. Cf. No. 184 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīThis is engraved in
matu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakravarti siṁghaṇadēvana tatpādapadmō
�jīvi magaramurāri sōyidēvanāyakaru kēsarppaṭiya kalidēvarige puḻpake koṭa
magara sōmanāthadēvara maḷavadiṁ teṁkalu mattaru 1 kuṟubagēriyiṁ mū
ḍalu nivēsaṇa caurasa 30 . svasti śrīmatu Aśēsamahājanaṁgaḷu kalidēvari
ge dhūpadīpanivēdyake tuva sahita mānyakāṟaru muṁmuridaṁḍa A
ṟuvatokkalu mukhyavāgi dhānyasahita mēṭivoḷage gāṇake hādake
ge hoṁge koṭali koṁḍali mānavata hēṟige E 50 A 2 . kalidēva rācā
ryya sivadēvana kaiyali dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mūḍi koṭṭaru . śrī kōma sarvvādhikārigaḻaṁ
kada kuṁbhaya tana paṭeyaṁtu tōṭa bhaṁḍi karituraka māṟali
koḷali bāhira suṁkavilleṁdu kalidēvage sarbbanamasyavāgi dhārāpūrvva
kaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru .
© śrīmatu dēvaṇagāveyaśēsamahājanaṁgaḷu kēsarppaṭiya kali
dēvarige hālumaṁḍagege koṭṭa mattaru 6 tōṭa mattaru keḷagaṇa ma
ḻave sahita sarbbanamasyanāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 20.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
